subparts.label: (a)
subparts.text: If \(P\) is a projector, prove that \(\operatorname{null}(P)\cap\operatorname{range}(P)=\{0\}\) and \(\operatorname{null}(P)=\operatorname{range}(I-P)\).

subparts.label: (b)
subparts.text: Prove that \(P\) is an orthogonal projector if and only if it is Hermitian.

problem.text: Let \(\lVert\cdot\rVert\) be a subordinate (induced) matrix norm.

subparts.label: (a)
subparts.text:
If \(E\) is \(n\times n\) with \(\lVert E\rVert<1\), then show \(I+E\) is nonsingular and
\[
\lVert(I+E)^{-1}\rVert\leq\frac{1}{1-\lVert E\rVert}.
\]

subparts.label: (b)
subparts.text:
If \(A\) is \(n\times n\) invertible and \(E\) is \(n\times n\) with \(\lVert A^{-1}\rVert\lVert E\rVert<1\), then show \(A+E\) is nonsingular and
\[
\lVert(A+E)^{-1}\rVert\leq\frac{\lVert A^{-1}\rVert}{1-\lVert A^{-1}\rVert\lVert E\rVert}.
\]

subparts.label: (a)
subparts.text: Find a singular value decomposition of \(A\).

subparts.label: (a)
subparts.text: Prove that \(\langle x,y\rangle_A=x^*Ay\) is an inner product on \(\mathbb{R}^m\) if and only if \(A\) is symmetric and positive definite.

subparts.label: (b)
subparts.text: Assume that \(A\) is symmetric and positive definite. If \(x_*\) is the solution to \(Ax=b\) and \(\{p_1,\cdots,p_m\}\) is an orthonormal basis for \(\mathbb{R}^m\) with respect to \(\langle\ ,\ \rangle_A\) and \(x_*=\sum c_i p_i\), give a formula for the \(c_i\).

problem.text: Let matrix \(A\in\mathbb{C}^{m\times n}\) with \(n<m\). Let a vector \(b\in\mathbb{C}^m\), and let \(r\) denote the residual vector \(r=b-Ax\).

subparts.label: (a)
subparts.text: Show that \(x\) solves the least-squares problem \(\min\lVert b-Ax\rVert_2\) if and only if \(r\in\operatorname{Null}(A^*)\).

subparts.label: (b)
subparts.text: Suppose \(A\) is full rank, and describe how to find the least-squares solution using the QR decomposition of \(A\).
